mapper.select: SELECT SUM(deduct_usdt) as sumUdst ,SUM(deduct_number) as deductNumber,count(*) as 'count' FROM t_user_promise_record where user_id = #{userId} and product_code=#{productCode}

SELECT SUM(pr.deduct_usdt) AS 'subscriptionLimit',SUM(nss.winning_number*nss.sub_price) AS 'winningQuota' FROM t_user_promise_record pr LEFT JOIN t_apply_new_shares_order nss ON pr.order_no=nss.order_no WHERE pr.user_id=#{userId}
